tests.note: same data as tambear fit_session_matches_fit test
near-collinear: col2 ≈ col0 + noise(1e-8). High condition number.
sklearn uses L-BFGS, tambear uses vanilla GD — coefficients may differ but accuracy should match
tambear uses L2Sq (squared distances), so eps comparison is on squared values
label assignment may differ (0/1 vs 1/0) — compare cluster membership, not label values
naive exp() would overflow; log-sum-exp trick required
